summary.intent: Build a full-featured Electron app UI for the 'gossamer' Claude Code session monitoring tool, with Mantine components, dark mode, chat-style session view, and the ability to spawn new Claude sessions from open items.
summary.outcome: Successfully migrated all UI to Mantine, implemented dark mode throughout, built a chat-transcript session view with avatars and nested tool uses, added breadcrumb navigation, relative timestamps, an interactive open items panel with status management, and a spawn-to-Terminal feature using AppleScript.

repo: Project is at /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer — Electron app in app/, backend server in src/, Prisma schema at prisma/schema.prisma, SQLite DB at ~/.claude/hook-handler.db
Backend is built with 'npm run build' from /Users/stephanostsoucas/gossamer and started with 'node dist/handler.js serve --db ~/.claude/hook-handler.db --port 3000'
Gossamer hooks are configured in ~/.claude/settings.json pointing to claude-hook-handler at /opt/homebrew/bin/claude-hook-handler
The indexer (src/indexer.ts) was deleting and recreating OpenItem rows on every pass — changed to upsert keyed on (checkpointSessionSummaryId, text) to preserve status/subSessionId
Sessions are served from GET /api/sessions already ordered by updatedAt DESC from the server
The SDK @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk query() calls the Anthropic API directly (not the claude CLI), so gossamer hooks do NOT fire unless settingSources: ['user','project'] is passed
Claude Code logo extracted from /Applications/Claude.app/Contents/Resources/electron.icns using iconutil

code.finding: ClaudeTurnCard groups consecutive toolGroups + Stop event into a single Claude bubble via groupClaudeTurns(). BreadcrumbContext used to push user/repo/sessionId crumbs up to Layout.
CopyCell wraps Table.Td with hover-triggered absolute ActionIcon for clipboard copy. activityDot() uses <2min=green, <15min=orange, else gray thresholds matching SessionTree.
Shared component for relative timestamps with Tooltip showing absolute time and click-to-copy. Exports relativeTime() and absoluteTime() helpers used elsewhere.
AppShell.Header spans full viewport width so hamburger is always visible. light-dark() CSS function used for all theme-aware colors. useDisclosure(true) for sidebar state.
delete process.env.CLAUDECODE at startServer() startup needed to allow SDK-spawned nested sessions. Spawn endpoint uses osascript to open Terminal with 'claude <prompt>' for interactive sessions.
Changed OpenItem creation from deleteMany+createMany to upsert keyed on {checkpointSessionSummaryId_text} unique constraint to preserve user-set status and subSessionId.
OpenItem now has status String @default('open'), subSessionId String?, and @@unique([checkpointSessionSummaryId, text]).

workflow: light-dark(lightValue, darkValue) CSS function is the correct pattern for Mantine v7 dark mode — Mantine's -0 color variants (e.g. gray-0, teal-0) are always light and must not be used for dark mode support
AppShell.Header must be used (not positioning inside AppShell.Main) for elements that need to remain visible regardless of sidebar state
Prisma schema changes require 'DATABASE_URL=file:~/.claude/hook-handler.db npx prisma db push' from the gossamer root
The Claude Code SDK query() requires settingSources: ['user','project'] for gossamer hooks to fire — without this the session runs but is never recorded in the DB
AppleScript via execSync osascript is the recommended approach for opening a new Terminal window with a command on macOS

friction: Multiple context window overflows mid-session requiring summary/resumption twice
SDK-spawned sessions not appearing in gossamer DB — root cause was missing settingSources option, took many debug iterations to discover
CLAUDECODE env var blocks nested sessions; had to delete it at server startup
Indexer wiping OpenItem status/subSessionId on every re-index — required schema unique constraint + upsert refactor
Mantine -0 color variants always light regardless of color scheme — not obvious until dark mode testing
User interrupted the IPC/terminal spawn implementation mid-way to redirect to SDK approach, then redirected again to AppleScript
OpenItem IDs not being included in API response initially caused PATCH calls to hit /api/open-items/undefined
open_items: subSessionId is not being set on OpenItems when a session is spawned — the AppleScript opens a terminal but returns no session ID, so we can't associate the new session with the item automatically
The spawned Claude session's progress is visible in gossamer Active Sessions but there's no UI link from an open item to its associated sub-session
CheckpointDetail.tsx dark mode — it was identified as having light-only colors (teal-0, gray-0) but may not have been fully fixed
Platform-agnostic spawn — current implementation uses osascript (macOS only) despite user wanting platform-agnostic; Linux/Windows not supported
No real-time status sync for open items — if another session marks an item complete, the current view won't update without a page refresh
